scope: descriptive exploration only; overlapping buckets; no decisions

patterns.name: stale_or_wrong_latest_thread_selection
patterns.description: Answer locks onto an older adjacent thread, freezes the state too early, or chooses a different surface as latest.

patterns.name: unsupported_durable_memory_or_persistence_claims
patterns.description: Answer asserts syke.db/MEMEX writeback, refresh, or durable persistence without evidence.

patterns.name: storage_state_vs_work_state_conflation
patterns.description: Answer treats empty/minimal store state as if it describes active work state.

patterns.name: invented_identifiers_or_overtrusted_handles
patterns.description: UUIDs or thread labels are presented as recovered facts rather than reconstructed handles.

patterns.name: numeric_overprecision_or_count_drift
patterns.description: Thread counts, proof counts, cycle counts, timestamps, or event totals exceed packet support.

patterns.name: packet_insufficiency_or_non_reconstructable_slice
patterns.description: Available packet is too thin or indirect to recover intended design/history state cleanly.

patterns.name: boundary_ambiguity
patterns.description: Judges differ on how much staleness, unsupported detail, or partial support remains passable.

patterns.name: generation_timeout
patterns.description: Answer source produced no substantive content because generation timed out.
